official_functions.role: Construct the official Play clientbound set_experience fixture
Write, decode, and observe the official progress, level, and total body
Name the packet id assigned in Play clientbound state

invariants: The official Play clientbound table assigns set_experience to packet id 0x67.
The official Play clientbound protocol codec dispatches the set_experience id to ClientboundSetExperiencePacket.
The official set_experience body is experience progress float, experience level VarInt, then total experience VarInt.
The fixture uses primitive XP values only and does not require initialized player state.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded XP fields, Play clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte counts are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove player XP state, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer player XP state, UI behavior, or client-load completion.
